text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf explains how the U.S. was defeated because it failed to achieve its goals. "In this section, look at why we say we are successful. Look at what the enemy's goal was. If the enemy didn't reach its goal, it would…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf explains Iran's rejection of the U.S.'s 15 point plan. "When the infrastructure is destroyed here, what kind of infrastructure will be destroyed? What kind of infrastructure will be destroyed in places that the Americans have settled in the region? And now when we hit, the countries of the region will be affected. If our oil wells are destroyed, there should be no oil left. When the infrastructure is destroyed, we should not use it. Why should the Americans use it? Why should they say that they will destroy the oil wells and take all the oil? This is natural. These threats have become ineffective. At this time, we were not even talking about negotiations. He also proposed a 15-point plan. The 15-point plan was officially sent to us by Pakistan's Deputy Prime Minister, the commander of the army there. He sent this plan to us. In fact, the UN Security Council discussed these issues. Naturally, all of this was transferred to the Commander-in-Chief. At that moment, it was reflected. A decision was made. It was decided that the 10-point plan should be adopted. It was our view that our demands, our goals, and the rights of the people were reflected in this 10-point plan. We did not say this to the Americans. We said this to Pakistan. In fact, we said that this is our word. We do not accept the 15-point plan. Our word is the 10-point plan. If the Americans have something to say about the 10-point plan, it is negotiable. We have not spoken to the Americans yet. They spoke to the Americans who were in the Middle East. They said that the Americans have to make a non-financial proposal. We insisted on our 10-point plan. We said that this is our view. If we want to be in this framework, we have to be in this framework. They then agreed to talk about this. They said that in order to start this, we have to give a temporary ceasefire. One of the important people was there. I do not want to be a part of their meeting. They agreed to this. Now that they are insisting on this, they say that there are three or four days left to finish this. In some places, our views have not been met. We have not accepted this clearly. But at the same time, we said to the people of Pakistan in the Middle East that we will not give up." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫解释了美国为何因未能实现其目标而战败。“在这一部分，看看为什么我们说我们是成功的。看看敌人的目标是什么。如果敌人没有达到目标，它就会……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫解释了伊朗拒绝美国15点计划的原因。“当这里的基础设施被摧毁时，什么样的基础设施会被摧毁？在美国人在该地区定居的地方，什么样的基础设施会被摧毁？现在当我们进行打击时，该地区的国家将会受到影响。如果我们的油井被摧毁，就不应该剩下石油。当基础设施被摧毁时，我们不应该使用它。为什么美国人要使用它？他们为什么要说他们会摧毁油井并夺走所有的石油？这是自然的。这些威胁已经变得无效。当时，我们甚至没有谈论谈判。他还提出了一个15点计划。这份15点计划是由巴基斯坦副总理、该国军队指挥官正式发送给我们的。他把这个计划发给了我们。事实上，联合国安理会讨论了这些问题。自然地，所有这些都被转达给了总司令。在那一刻，它得到了反映。做出了一个决定。决定采纳10点计划。我们的观点是，我们的要求、我们的目标和人民的权利都反映在这10点计划中。我们没有对美国人说这些。我们对巴基斯坦说了这些。事实上，我们说这就是我们的话。我们不接受15点计划。我们的话是10点计划。如果美国人对10点计划有什么要说的，那是可以协商的。我们还没有和美国人谈过。他们和在中东的美国人谈了。他们说美国人必须提出一个非财务性的建议。我们坚持我们的10点计划。我们说这就是我们的观点。如果我们想在这个框架内，我们就必须在这个框架内。他们随后同意谈论这个问题。他们说为了开始这个，我们必须给予临时停火。其中一个重要人物在那里。我不想成为他们会议的一部分。他们同意了这一点。现在他们坚持这一点，他们说距离结束还有三四天的时间。在某些地方，我们的观点没有得到满足。我们没有明确接受这一点。但与此同时，我们对中东的巴基斯坦人民说，我们不会放弃。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf said that after Iran shot down the F-15, the U.S. understood Iran's capabilities. It is worth noting for context that Iranian state media claims the downed F-15 was an F-35. "I would like to say that in this…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf explains how the U.S. was defeated because it failed to achieve its goals. "In this section, look at why we say we are successful. Look at what the enemy's goal was. If the enemy didn't reach its goal, it would have been defeated. We didn't attack, it attacked. It had a goal. It wanted to surrender Iran. It took two to three days. How many days is it today? We fought for more than 40 days. Now we have 10 days to cease fire. But in those 40 days, we were forced to cease fire. So it couldn't surrender us. It wanted to suppress the regime. It couldn't suppress it. It thought Iran was like Venezuela. It would act like Venezuela. Four days later, it would say, We took the oil from Iran. Whoever wants to take oil from us, should take it from the Persian Gulf. This was its goal. This was its third goal. In the first days, it would say, With the bombardment that I will make, I will destroy all the missiles in Iran. As time went by, look at the accuracy of our fire. It didn't happen. No matter how much it bombed, it couldn't take our people away from us. We had said before that it wouldn't happen. We were even vulnerable in the launchers. This time, you saw, the power of our fire, the diversity of our fire was found. In Isfahan, there was a situation, worse than the situation in Tabas. It had decided, from the western and eastern borders, against the revolution, it would say, I gave weapons to a few of them. They would attack us and capture us there. No matter how hard it tried, it didn't succeed. It was looking for internal clues. Before the war and after the war. We saw this. It couldn't do it. It decided to attack the ground. It couldn't do it. It came to the Hormuz strait, to say that it would occupy this place. It invited the world, but no one answered. It invited NATO, but no one answered. It came to do it, but no one answered. It is clear that we are winning in this battle. They admit it, the enemy admits it, our friends admit it. Ideas and hopes are everywhere. But look, this is very different from saying that we destroyed their army." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫表示，在伊朗击落F-15战机后，美国了解了伊朗的能力。值得注意的是，伊朗官方媒体声称被击落的F-15实际上是一架F-35。‘我想说的是，在这一点上……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫解释了美国为何因未能实现目标而战败。“在这一部分，看看为什么我们说我们是成功的。看看敌人的目标是什么。如果敌人没有达到目标，它就是失败了。我们没有进攻，是它进攻了。它有一个目标。它想让伊朗投降。它以为需要两到三天。今天是多少天了？我们战斗了40多天。现在我们还有10天停火。但在那40天里，我们被迫停火。所以它没能让我们投降。它想镇压政权。它没能镇压。它以为伊朗就像委内瑞拉。它会像对待委内瑞拉那样行事。四天后，它会说，我们从伊朗拿走了石油。谁想从我们这里拿走石油，就应该从波斯湾拿走。这就是它的目标。这是它的第三个目标。在最初的几天里，它会说，通过我的轰炸，我将摧毁伊朗所有的导弹。随着时间的推移，看看我们火力的准确性。这并没有发生。无论它轰炸多少次，它都无法将我们的人民从我们身边夺走。我们之前说过这不会发生。我们甚至在发射装置上很脆弱。这一次，你们看到了，我们的火力力量，我们火力的多样性被发现了。在伊斯法罕，情况比塔巴斯的情况更糟。它决定从西部和东部边界对抗革命，它会说，我给了他们中的一些人武器。他们会攻击我们并在那里俘虏我们。无论它怎么努力，都没有成功。它在寻找内部线索。战前和战后。我们看到了这一点。它做不到。它决定进行地面攻击。它做不到。它来到霍尔木兹海峡，声称要占领这个地方。它邀请了全世界，但没有人回应。它邀请了北约，但没有人回应。它想这样做，但没有人回应。很明显，我们在这场战斗中正在获胜。他们承认这一点，敌人承认这一点，我们的朋友也承认这一点。思想和希望无处不在。但看，这与说我们摧毁了他们的军队有很大不同。” @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 "In various regions of the world, I had conversations with different representatives, enlightened, educated people occupying not the last positions in their countries. I made terrible discoveries: they did not know at all that the Soviet Union lost 27 million people, of which no less than 14 to 16 million were civilians." — Russian FM spokesperson Maria Zakharova 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf says that the U.S. has failed to achieve the goals it set out to achieve. “You have done this, we have given our opinion, if the United States is after this, the Trump tweet must announce that it has a request…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf said that after Iran shot down the F-15, the U.S. understood Iran's capabilities. It is worth noting for context that Iranian state media claims the downed F-15 was an F-35. "I would like to say that in this war, as I have explained before, that if a war were to take place, I would be asked many times, what is special and what is common, and I have pointed out in my second lecture that if a war were to take place, we would be in our master's position. Everyone would be in a low position, everyone would be in a high position. And most importantly, we are definitely stronger than the past. And today, our enemy would not have believed this, but today, we have seen this in the field. Today, our people are purer than they were. And you will see that now, about 50 nights, these people are on the streets every day. This means that our armed forces, our capacity, in the field of art, you can see, we have hit about 170 to 180 targets. In the past, we did not have this kind of capability in the field of art. You can see that all the events took place in our mind. Yes, yes. You can see that now is not the time. I would like to say that what a miracle of a revolution, and what a strength of a great leader, in the midst of an unprecedented war, and in the midst of scientific progress, everyone saw this. The enemy itself observed this. Anyway, hitting F-35s is not a coincidence. It is not a coincidence. This is a struggle in a variety of dimensions. The capabilities of art, the capabilities of design, I do not want to say anything here. Those who understand, will understand what I am saying. If you saw that the missile that exploded near our airfield, I will not talk about the art of this, it exploded, you will understand what this capability means, and which direction we are going. So, I would like to say, from the first war to the second war, which took place eight or nine months apart, and this war actually took place twice, this design, this event took place, and these capabilities were shown." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫表示，美国未能实现其设定的目标。“你们已经这样做了，我们已经发表了意见，如果美国追求这一点，特朗普的推文必须宣布它有一个请求……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫表示，在伊朗击落F-15战机后，美国了解了伊朗的能力。值得注意的是，伊朗官方媒体声称被击落的F-15实际上是F-35。“我想说的是，在这场战争中，正如我之前解释的那样，如果发生战争，我会被多次问到，什么是特殊的，什么是共同的，我在第二次讲座中指出，如果发生战争，我们将处于主导地位。每个人都会处于低位，每个人都会处于高位。最重要的是，我们绝对比过去更强大。今天，我们的敌人不会相信这一点，但今天，我们在实地看到了这一点。今天，我们的人民比过去更纯洁。你会看到，现在大约50个夜晚，这些人每天都在街上。这意味着我们的武装部队，我们的能力，在艺术领域，你可以看到，我们已经打击了大约170到180个目标。过去，我们在艺术领域没有这种能力。你可以看到所有事件都发生在我们的脑海中。是的，是的。你可以看到现在不是时候。我想说的是，革命的奇迹是什么，伟大领袖的力量是什么，在史无前例的战争中，在科学进步中，每个人都看到了这一点。敌人自己也观察到了这一点。无论如何，击中F-35并非巧合。这不是巧合。这是一场多维度的斗争。艺术的能力，设计的能力，我不想在这里多说什么。懂的人自然会明白我在说什么。如果你看到在我们机场附近爆炸的导弹，我不会谈论它的艺术性，它爆炸了，你就会明白这种能力意味着什么，以及我们正朝着哪个方向前进。所以，我想说，从第一次战争到第二次战争，相隔八九个月，这场战争实际上发生了两次，这个设计，这个事件发生了，这些能力也展现了出来。” @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender U.S. intelligence and military officials estimate that Iran still maintains about 40% of its pre-war arsenal of long-range attack drones, as well as 60% of its ballistic and cruise missile launchers, with over 100 systems that were buried inside caves and bunkers as a result of U.S. and Israeli strikes having been recovered since the start of the two-week ceasefire on April 8. In addition, some American estimates assess that Iran could reclaim as much as 70% of its pre-war stockpile of missiles, similarly buried in rubble from attacks on its bunkers and depots, officials tell The New York Times. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国情报和军事官员估计，伊朗仍保留了其战前约 40% 的远程攻击无人机库存，以及 60% 的弹道导弹和巡航导弹发射装置。自 4 月 8 日两周停火开始以来，已有 100 多套因美国和以色列袭击而被埋在洞穴和掩体中的系统被回收。此外，据官员告诉《纽约时报》，一些美国评估认为，伊朗可能收回多达 70% 的战前导弹库存，这些导弹同样被埋在袭击其掩体和仓库后的废墟中。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : The USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN-78) and her Carrier Strike Group, who on Thursday hit 296-days at sea, surpassing the record for the longest deployed aircraft carrier since the end of the Cold War, has since transited the Suez Canal from the Eastern Mediterranean and is once again conducting operations in the Red Sea, in support of U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM), two defense officials tell the Associated Press. The Ford, which initially left the Red Sea in March, after suffering a severe ventilation fire that started in the ship’s laundry and resulted in damage to hundreds of berthings and other compartments, was expected to finally return to Naval Station Norfolk in Virginia after loitering for the last few weeks in the Eastern Mediterranean - with stops in Crete and Croatia. Though it appears that the carrier and its crew has yet again been ordered to remain on station near Iran until the arrival of the USS George H. W. Bush (CVN-77), who is currently taking the long way to the region around the Cape of Good Hope in Southern Africa. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT OSINTdefender 转发 @sentdefender ：杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰（CVN-78）及其航母打击群周四在海上停留了 296 天，打破了冷战结束以来航母最长部署时间的纪录。据两名国防官员告诉美联社，该航母打击群已从东地中海通过苏伊士运河，目前再次在红海执行任务，以支持美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）。福特号最初于 3 月离开红海，此前其舰上洗衣房发生严重通风火灾，导致数百个铺位和其他舱室受损。原本预计它在东地中海徘徊数周（期间停靠克里特岛和克罗地亚）后，最终将返回弗吉尼亚州的诺福克海军基地。但目前看来，该航母及其船员再次接到命令，需留在伊朗附近海域待命，直到乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）抵达。布什号目前正绕道非洲南部的好望角前往该地区。推文

text: OSINTdefender Chances that commercial traffic in the Strait of Hormuz returns to normal anytime soon have plummeted in the last 24 hours on Polymarket, as Iran announces it is once again fully closing the vital shipping lane, with traders on Polymarket believing there is only a 24% chance that the strait will be reopened by the end of April. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在 Polymarket 上，霍尔木兹海峡的商业航运在短期内恢复正常的可能性在过去 24 小时内大幅下降，因为伊朗宣布再次全面关闭这一重要航道。Polymarket 上的交易员认为，该海峡在 4 月底前重新开放的可能性仅为 24%。推文

text: 🇮🇹 Italian Deputy Prime Minister Matteo Salvini has called for resuming Russian gas imports to avoid what he warns could be an "energy lockdown." "Rather than closing factories, schools and hospitals, let's go back to buying gas and oil from around the world, Russia included. We are not at war with Russia," Salvini said at a Patriots for Europe rally in Milan today. ℹ️ The call comes as Europe's dependence on Russian LNG deepens. In Q1 2026, the EU took 97% of available cargoes from Russia's Yamal LNG project, up 17% year-on-year to 5 million tonnes, costing EU member states an estimated €2.88 billion, according to the Financial Times citing data from Kpler and environmental group Urgewald. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇹 意大利副总理马泰奥·萨尔维尼呼吁恢复俄罗斯天然气进口，以避免他所警告的“能源封锁”。萨尔维尼今天在米兰举行的“欧洲爱国者”集会上表示：“与其关闭工厂、学校和医院，不如让我们重新开始从世界各地购买天然气和石油，包括俄罗斯。我们并没有与俄罗斯开战。” ℹ️ 这一呼吁是在欧洲对俄罗斯液化天然气（LNG）的依赖加深之际提出的。据《金融时报》援引 Kpler 和环保组织 Urgewald 的数据，2026 年第一季度，欧盟接收了俄罗斯亚马尔液化天然气项目 97% 的可用货物，同比增长 17%，达到 500 万吨，欧盟成员国为此支付了约 28.8 亿欧元。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary Speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf explains how Iran was able to fight an asymmetrical war against the U.S. "I would like to make a point here. This does not mean that we are stronger in military power than the United States. There…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian parliamentary speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf said progress was made in some areas during the Islamabad talks, but wide gaps remain and a final agreement is still distant. Interviewer: "Has the negotiation process made progress? Do you think further negotiations are likely or on the horizon? Because many [people/sources] are constantly claiming that on Sunday or Monday information will be released regarding a specific negotiation date and so on." Ghalibaf: "Well, look—yes, on some subjects, we have reached a conclusion. But on other subjects, no; other proposals have been put forward. However, we are still far from that final discussion. That is to say, there are certain points that we insist upon. We insist on them in the sense that these demands are truly not something we can overlook; they are not negotiable. We have such points. Now, these issues might only be one or two—just one or two. They [the other side] also have their own positions; as the saying goes, they have their own red lines. Currently, work is being pursued in these areas. But if I want to sum it up: we have made progress, but the gaps are still wide. Some fundamental points remain. This is an important point for us to recognize. And the point that the Americans must understand is this: America must decide to earn the trust of the Iranian nation. This is the most important step the Americans must take. If they truly want to respond in good faith, they must abandon their current negotiating approach of unilateralism and the spirit of trying to impose their will on us. They have already experienced [the fact] that such an approach achieves nothing. Our policy is a step-by-step approach. For us, it is 'commitment for commitment.' They must take a step, and we must take a step. It shouldn't be that we fulfill our commitments while they do not. We have tried to approach these experiences with that same sense of mistrust [in mind]." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫解释了伊朗如何能够与美国进行非对称战争。“我想在这里指出一点。这并不意味着我们在军事力量上比美国更强大。那里……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示，伊斯兰堡会谈在某些领域取得了进展，但仍存在巨大分歧，距离达成最终协议还很遥远。采访者：“谈判进程取得进展了吗？你认为未来还会进行谈判吗？因为许多[人/消息来源]不断声称周日或周一将发布关于特定谈判日期等信息。” 卡利巴夫：“嗯，看——是的，在某些议题上，我们已经达成了结论。但在其他议题上，没有；提出了其他建议。然而，我们距离最终讨论还很远。也就是说，有些点是我们坚持的。我们坚持它们的意思是，这些要求确实不是我们可以忽视的；它们是不可谈判的。我们有这样的点。现在，这些问题可能只有一两个——仅仅一两个。他们[对方]也有自己的立场；俗话说，他们有自己的红线。目前，工作正在这些领域进行。但如果我想总结一下：我们取得了进展，但差距仍然很大。一些根本性问题依然存在。这对我们来说是一个重要的认识点。美国人必须明白的一点是：美国必须决定赢得伊朗人民的信任。这是美国人必须采取的最重要的一步。如果他们真的想以诚意回应，他们必须放弃目前单边主义的谈判方式以及试图将他们的意志强加于我们的精神。他们已经经历过[事实]，即这种方法一无所获。我们的政策是循序渐进的方法。对我们来说，是‘承诺换承诺’。他们必须迈出一步，我们也必须迈出一步。不应该是我们履行承诺而他们不履行。我们试图带着那种同样的不信任感[在心中]来处理这些经历。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary Speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf said Tehran confronted U.S. minesweeping efforts in the Strait of Hormuz during the Islamabad talks and warned that any advance would be met with fire. The U.S. requested 15 minutes to order a…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary Speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf explains how Iran was able to fight an asymmetrical war against the U.S. "I would like to make a point here. This does not mean that we are stronger in military power than the United States. There are two reasons for this. The Americans have more money than us. They have more equipment than us. They have more resources than us. That is why they have committed crimes in the world. Because their work is always offensive. They have more experience than us. The Zionist regime, which is active and active in the region, and for their own benefit, as you saw in the previous war, pointed out that if in the previous US government, if there was no Israel, we would have created an Israel in the region. In reality, their gendarmes want to do their job here. Well, they also have superior power. Sometimes I see my dear people say that we have destroyed them. No, we have not destroyed them. We are the winners of the battlefield in this war. We have been able to do this. This is an important point to know. Of course, equipment, resources, and money have an impact on war and victory. But this does not always happen. We fought a war against them without their permission. We fought with our own plans and our own readiness. We fought against the enemy without their permission. But we did not use our own plans and strategies properly. What I am saying is that they are making wrong strategic decisions. For example, they are making wrong decisions about our people. They are also making wrong decisions about their own strategic plans. I said in the last episode that the US government is the first, but in reality, Israel is the first, because they are making wrong decisions about their own strategic plans. I want to say this. Why? I sometimes hear from our dear friends, and even some of my own national media, that we have destroyed all the military forces. Let's destroy the rest of them too. Let's not negotiate. I want to say that we are definitely the winner of the battlefield. This is why Trump has a request for a ceasefire. We have to realise this." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示，德黑兰在伊斯兰堡会谈期间对抗了美国的扫雷行动，并警告称任何推进都将遭到火力回击。美国请求15分钟时间来下令……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫解释了伊朗如何能够与美国进行非对称战争。“我想在这里说明一点。这并不意味着我们在军事力量上比美国更强大。原因有二。美国人的钱比我们多。他们的装备比我们多。他们的资源比我们多。这就是为什么他们在世界上犯下罪行。因为他们的工作总是进攻性的。他们的经验比我们多。在地区活跃并为自身利益服务的犹太复国主义政权，正如你们在之前的战争中所看到的那样，指出如果在美国上届政府中没有以色列，我们就会在地区内创造一个以色列。实际上，他们的宪兵想在这里做他们的工作。好吧，他们也拥有优势力量。有时我看到我亲爱的人民说我们已经摧毁了他们。不，我们没有摧毁他们。在这场战争中，我们是战场上的赢家。我们已经能够做到这一点。这是一个需要知道的重要点。当然，装备、资源和金钱对战争和胜利有影响。但这并不总是发生。我们在没有得到他们许可的情况下与他们进行了战争。我们用自己的计划和自己的准备进行了战斗。我们在没有得到他们许可的情况下与敌人进行了战斗。但我们没有正确使用自己的计划和战略。我想说的是，他们正在做出错误的战略决策。例如，他们对我们的人民做出了错误的决定。他们对自己的战略计划也做出了错误的决定。我在上一集里说过，美国政府是第一位的，但实际上，以色列是第一位的，因为他们对自己的战略计划做出了错误的决定。我想说的是。为什么？我有时从我们亲爱的朋友，甚至我本国的一些媒体那里听到，我们已经摧毁了所有的军事力量。让我们也摧毁剩下的那些吧。让我们不要谈判。我想说的是，我们绝对是战场上的赢家。这就是为什么特朗普要求停火。我们必须意识到这一点。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 NYT : Iran has turned its control over the Strait of Hormuz into a powerful deterrent, regardless of any restrictions on its nuclear programme.
